entries.expectedErrorPattern: Cannot rollback patients ciphertext columns to VARCHAR\(30\): [0-9]+ rows exceed width\.
entries.rationale: Ciphertext-width widening from VARCHAR(30) to TEXT is data-preserving forward path; shrink rollback is unsafe without truncation or destructive rewrite.

The migration deterministically nulls ineligible nominated/delegated admin links; rollback would re-create dangling FK references to operational-only, deactivated, or soft-deleted staff. Recovery posture is pre-migration snapshot restore plus forward-fix.
